name: hk-racing-analyzer
description: 香港赛马数据分析和预测工具。基于历史战绩、赔率走势、配速分段等数据进行量化分析，给出前3名概率分布和投注建议。HKJC赛马专用。
description_en: HK Horse Racing Analyzer — Quantitative prediction tool for HKJC races, delivering top-3 probability distribution via historical performance, odds trends, sectional timing, jockey/trainer stats, and expert consensus.
author: kus-wang
